description.ko: 보이지 않는 빠른 주파수가 고요한 얼음 표면 위에 미니멀한 공명선으로 새겨진다.
description.en: Fast invisible frequencies are etched as minimal resonant lines across a silent frozen surface.

prompt: ECHO-0 sound visualization rendered as an overhead view of a silent acoustic seismogram etched into a transparent frozen-water slab, with no object producing the sound. Invisible rhythm appears as razor-thin #4169E1 royal-blue vibration paths racing through clear ice channels, each line sharply displaced into fast #FF4500 orange fracture-notches at transient impacts. Sparse #FFD700 gold phase flecks sit only where two frequencies lock for an instant, while a few #32CD32 lime calibration dashes skim the outer edge like syncopated timing errors. The ice surface is mostly empty and luminous, with tiny refractive seams, crisp micro-shadows under lifted line segments, almost no particles, and rapid staccato bends showing vibrating frequencies reacting to unheard sound. Minimal, rhythmic, high-contrast resonance in silence; avoid speakers, performers, spheres, cores, dark voids, corridors, membranes, monuments, and holographic UI.
